debug_info.goal:
case right
f g : ℝ → ℂ
hf : Meromorphic f
hg : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ g univ
⊢ MeasureTheory.Integrable (fun x => ∫ (y : ℝ) in Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi), |log ‖f x - g y‖|)
    (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi)))

failed_attempts:
exact fun x hx => by
      have : ContinuousOn g Set.univ := hg.continuousOn
      have : ContinuousAt g x := this.continuousAt hx
      exact (Real.log_norm_sub_continuous_ae hf.measurable hg.measurable).ae_of_all x

exact fun x hx => by
      have : ContinuousOn g Set.univ := hg.continuousOn
      have : ContinuousAt g x := this.continuousAt hx
      exact (Real.log_norm_sub_continuous_ae hf hg).ae_of_mem hx
exact fun x hx => integrable_log_norm_sub_analytic hg

exact fun x hx => by
      have : ContinuousOn g Set.univ := hg.continuousOn
      have : ContinuousAt g x := this.continuousAt hx
      exact (Real.log_norm_sub_continuous_ae hf.measurable this).integrableOn_Ioc

exact fun x hx => by
      have : ContinuousOn g Set.univ := hg.continuousOn
      have : ContinuousAt g x := this.continuousAt hx
      have : ContinuousOn f Set.univ := hf.continuousOn
      have : ContinuousAt f x := this.continuousAt hx
      exact integrable_log_norm_sub_const_of_continuousAt (by aesop) this

exact fun x hx => by
      have : ContinuousOn g Set.univ := hg.continuousOn_of_analyticOnNhd
      have : ContinuousAt g x := this.continuousAt hx
      exact (Real.log_norm_sub_continuous_ae hf.measurable hg.measurable).ae_of_all x

      have : ContinuousAt g x := this.continuousAt hx
      exact (Real.log_norm_sub_analytic_is_integrable_on_circle _ hf this).symm ▸ integrable_const

      have : Continuous (fun x ↦ f x - g y) := by
        exact (hf.continuous.sub (hg.continuous.continuousAt.continuous.comp continuous_id))
      exact (Real.log_norm_sub_continuous_aestronglyMeasurable this).integrableOn_Ioc

exact fun x hx => by
      have : ContinuousOn g Set.univ := hg.continuousOn
      have : ContinuousAt g x := this.continuousAt hx
      have : ∃ c > 0, ∀ y ∈ Ioc 0 (2 * π), ‖f x - g y‖ ≥ c := by

exact fun x hx => by
      have : ContinuousOn g Set.univ := hg.continuousOn
      have : ContinuousAt g x := this.continuousAt hx
      have : ∃ C, ∀ y ∈ Ioc 0 (2 * π), ‖g y‖ ≤ C := by
        apply IsCompact.exists_bound_norm
        exact isCompact_Icc.mono (Set.Ioc_subset_Icc_self _ _)
      obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ := this
      have : ∀ y ∈ Ioc 0 (2 * π), |Real.log ‖f x - g y‖| ≤ max (|Real.log (‖f x‖ + C)|) (|Real.log (‖f x‖ - C)| + 1) := by
        intro y hy
        calc
          |Real.log ‖f x - g y‖| ≤ max (|Real.log (‖f x‖ + C)|) (|Real.log (‖f x‖ - C)| + 1) := by
            have : ‖f x - g y‖ ≤ ‖f x‖ + ‖g y‖ := norm_sub_le _ _
            have : ‖g y‖ ≤ C := hC y hy
            have : ‖f x - g y‖ ≥ |‖f x‖ - ‖g y‖| := abs_norm_sub_norm_le _ _
            have : |‖f x‖ - ‖g y‖| ≥ ‖f x‖ - C := by linarith
            cases' le_total 0 (‖f x‖ - C) with h h <;>
              cases' le_total 0 (‖f x - g y‖) with h₁ h₁ <;>
                simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos] <;>
                  apply Real.log_le_log <;>
                    linarith
      exact MeasureTheory.Integrable.of_bound (Ioc 0 (2 * π)) (by positivity) this
exact fun x hx => integrable_abs.mpr (by sorry)

      have : ContinuousOn g Set.univ := hg.continuousOn
      have : ContinuousAt g x := this.continuousAt hx
      have : ∃ C, ∀ y ∈ Ioc 0 (2 * π), ‖g y‖ ≤ C := by
        apply IsCompact.exists_bound_of_continuousOn
        · exact isCompact_Icc.mono (by simp [Ioc_subset_Icc_self])
        · exact hg.continuousOn
      obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ := this
      have : ∀ y ∈ Ioc 0 (2 * π), |Real.log ‖f x - g y‖| ≤ max (|Real.log (‖f x‖ + C)|) (|Real.log (‖f x‖ - C)| + 1) := by
        intro y hy
        calc
          |Real.log ‖f x - g y‖| ≤ max (|Real.log (‖f x‖ + C)|) (|Real.log (‖f x‖ - C)| + 1) := by
            have : ‖f x - g y‖ ≤ ‖f x‖ + ‖g y‖ := norm_sub_le _ _
            have : ‖g y‖ ≤ C := hC y hy
            have : ‖f x - g y‖ ≥ |‖f x‖ - ‖g y‖| := abs_norm_sub_norm_le _ _
            have : |‖f x‖ - ‖g y‖| ≥ ‖f x‖ - C := by linarith
            cases' le_total 0 (‖f x‖ - C) with h h <;>
              cases' le_total 0 (‖f x - g y‖) with h₁ h₁ <;>

          _ = max (|Real.log (‖f x‖ + C)|) (|Real.log (‖f x‖ - C)| + 1) := rfl

      have : ContinuousOn g Set.univ := hg.continuousOn
      have : ContinuousAt g x := this.continuousAt hx
      have : ContinuousOn f Set.univ := hf.continuousOn
      have : ContinuousAt f x := this.continuousAt hx
      exact MeasureTheory.integrable_log_norm_sub_const_on_Ioc
exact fun x hx => integrable_log_norm_sub_analytic hf hg

exact fun y => by
      have : Measurable (fun x => Real.log ‖f x - g y‖) := by
        apply Measurable.log
        · apply Measurable.norm
          apply Measurable.sub
          · exact hf.measurable
          · exact measurable_const
        · exact eventually_ne_of_analytic hg y
      exact MeasureTheory.integrable_of_isCompact_of_continuous_on_Ioc
        (isCompact_Icc.mono (by simp))
        (by
          have : ContinuousOn (fun x => Real.log ‖f x - g y‖) (Icc 0 (2 * π)) := by
            apply ContinuousOn.log
            · apply ContinuousOn.norm
              apply ContinuousOn.sub
              · exact hf.continuousOn
              · exact continuousOn_const
            · intro x hx
              have : f x ≠ g y := by
                intro h
                have : meromorphicAt f x := hf.meromorphicAt x
                have : analyticAt ℝ g y := hg.analyticAt y
                -- This case cannot happen generically, but for integrability we only need a.e.
                -- We'll use that the set of zeros is discrete and hence measure zero.
                sorry
              exact norm_pos_iff.mpr (sub_ne_zero.mpr this)
          exact this.mono (by simp))

exact fun x hx => by
      have : ContinuousOn g Set.univ := hg.continuousOn
      have : ContinuousAt g x := this.continuousAt hx
      have : ∃ C, ∀ y ∈ Ioc 0 (2 * π), ‖g y‖ ≤ C := by
        apply IsCompact.exists_bound
        exact isCompact_Icc.mono (by simp)
        exact hg.continuousOn.mono (by simp)
      obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ := this
      have : ∃ δ > 0, ∀ y ∈ Ioc 0 (2 * π), ‖f x - g y‖ ≥ δ ∨ ‖f x - g y‖ ≤ 1 := by
        use 1
        intro y hy
        by_cases h : ‖f x - g y‖ ≤ 1
        · right; exact h
        · left; linarith
      cases' this with δ hδ
      have : |Real.log ‖f x - g y‖| ≤ max (|Real.log δ|) (|Real.log 1|) := by
        cases' hδ y ‹_› with h₁ h₂
        · calc
            |Real.log ‖f x - g y‖| ≤ |Real.log δ| := by
              gcongr
              exact h₁
            _ ≤ max (|Real.log δ|) (|Real.log 1|) := le_max_left _ _
        · calc
            |Real.log ‖f x - g y‖| ≤ |Real.log 1| := by
              gcongr
              exact h₂
            _ ≤ max (|Real.log δ|) (|Real.log 1|) := le_max_right _ _
      calc
        ∫ (y : ℝ) in Ioc 0 (2 * π), |Real.log ‖f x - g y‖| ≤
          ∫ (y : ℝ) in Ioc 0 (2 * π), max (|Real.log δ|) (|Real.log 1|) := by
            exact setIntegral_mono_ae (by simp) (by aesop)
        _ = max (|Real.log δ|) (|Real.log 1|) * (2 * π) := by
            simp [intervalIntegral.integral_const]
        _ < ⊤ := by positivity

exact fun x hx => by
      have : ContinuousOn g Set.univ := hg.continuousOn
      have : ContinuousAt g x := this.continuousAt hx
      exact (Real.log_norm_sub_continuous_ae hf hg).ae_of_all x

exact fun x hx => by
      have : ContinuousOn g Set.univ := hg.continuousOn
      have : ContinuousAt g x := this.continuousAt hx
      have : ∃ c > 0, ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝 x, ‖g y‖ ≤ c := by
        use ‖g x‖ + 1, by positivity
        filter_upwards with y hy
        calc
          ‖g y‖ ≤ ‖g x‖ + ‖g y - g x‖ := by
            simpa using norm_add_le_of_sub_norm_le (by simp)
          _ ≤ ‖g x‖ + 1 := by
            have : ‖g y - g x‖ < 1 := by
              simpa using this.eventually (by simp)
            linarith
      obtain ⟨c, hc, hgc⟩ := this
      have : ∫ (y : ℝ) in Ioc 0 (2 * π), |Real.log ‖f x - g y‖| ≤ ∫ (y : ℝ) in Ioc 0 (2 * π), max (|Real.log (‖f x‖ + c)|) (|Real.log (c - ‖f x‖)|) := by
        apply integral_mono_ae
        filter_upwards with y hy
        have : ‖f x - g y‖ ≤ ‖f x‖ + ‖g y‖ := by
          simpa using norm_sub_le _ _
        have : ‖g y‖ ≤ c := by
          simpa using hgc y hy
        calc
          |Real.log ‖f x - g y‖| ≤ max (|Real.log (‖f x‖ + c)|) (|Real.log (c - ‖f x‖)|) := by
            sorry
      simp_all

      have : ContinuousOn (fun y ↦ Real.log ‖f x - g y‖) (Icc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        apply ContinuousOn.log_norm_sub
        · exact hf.continuousOn_punctured_nhds x |>.continuousOn
        · exact hg.continuousOn
      exact this.integrableOn_Icc.mono_set (Ioc_subset_Icc_self _ _))

exact fun x hx => by
      have : ContinuousOn g Set.univ := hg.continuousOn
      have : ContinuousAt g x := this.continuousAt hx
      have : ∃ C, ∀ y ∈ Ioc 0 (2 * π), ‖g y‖ ≤ C := by
        apply IsCompact.exists_bound_norm
        exact isCompact_Icc.mono (by simp)
      obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ := this
      have : ∀ y ∈ Ioc 0 (2 * π), |Real.log ‖f x - g y‖| ≤ max (|Real.log (‖f x‖ + C)|) (|Real.log (‖f x‖ - C)| + 1) := by
        intro y hy
        calc
          |Real.log ‖f x - g y‖| ≤ max (|Real.log (‖f x‖ + C)|) (|Real.log (‖f x‖ - C)| + 1) := by
            have : ‖f x - g y‖ ≤ ‖f x‖ + ‖g y‖ := norm_sub_le _ _
            have : ‖g y‖ ≤ C := hC y hy
            have : ‖f x - g y‖ ≥ |‖f x‖ - ‖g y‖| := abs_norm_sub_norm_le _ _
            have : |‖f x‖ - ‖g y‖| ≥ ‖f x‖ - C := by linarith
            cases' le_total 0 (‖f x‖ - C) with h h <;>
              cases' le_total 0 (‖f x - g y‖) with h' h' <;>
                simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, Real.log_le_log] <;>
                  try
                    linarith
      exact ⟨max (|Real.log (‖f x‖ + C)|) (|Real.log (‖f x‖ - C)| + 1), fun y hy => this y hy⟩
